brand.name: MyKalaakar
brand.tagline: Connecting Artists, Culture & Events Across India
hero.metric.opportunities: Connecting local talent with real opportunities
section.artForms.title: Traditional forms, presented with respect
section.artForms.subtitle: Discover folk dance, music, ritual performances, and cultural groups rooted in Maharashtra's living traditions.
section.featured.title: Artists with a story, not product cards
section.featured.subtitle: Browse verified performers, ensembles, and cultural specialists with image-led profiles.
section.events.title: Opportunities for the right artists
section.events.subtitle: Event briefs stay clean and artist-focused, with art type matching ready for smarter recommendations.
event.defaultDescription: A curated cultural event looking for authentic Maharashtra artists.
trust.heritageText: A warm platform for Maharashtra's traditional artists, not a shopping marketplace.
trust.opportunityText: Artists, groups, and event hosts can meet through clear cultural context.
trust.matchingText: Events can now target artists by art form, so performers see relevant opportunities.
cta.artist.title: Showcase your art with dignity and reach the events that need you.
cta.artist.text: Build a profile that highlights your tradition, location, media, and performance strengths while the existing approval workflow remains unchanged.
footer.copy: Built for India's artists, event hosts, and cultural communities.
hero.slide1.title: Experience Maharashtra's Cultural Soul
hero.slide1.text: A cinematic gateway to Dhol Pathak, Zanj Pathak, Varakari devotion, folk dance, and living traditions.
hero.slide1.alt: Dhol Pathak artist performing in traditional attire
hero.slide2.title: Discover Authentic Folk Artists
hero.slide2.text: Find verified performers, devotional singers, musicians, and cultural groups with portfolio-first profiles.
hero.slide3.title: Bring Tradition to Your Events
hero.slide3.text: Post a clear event brief and connect with the right art forms for ceremonies, festivals, and cultural programs.
hero.slide3.alt: Traditional zanj cymbals in a temple ceremony
